title: brain evidence resolve <runId|evidenceId> — --json success output
description: Resolve a pending or ambiguous evidence re-verification outcome by re-anchoring the evidence to its current rendition. Evidence verification is MARKDOWN-SSOT: the resolution is NOT a direct anchoring-metadata/ledger write (that would be lost on a `db rebuild`). A re-anchor that CONFIRMS the evidence flows through the canonical mutation workflow — a validated `UpdateEvidenceVerification` ChangePlan → patch → agent commit → broker CAS integration (workflow-risk-contract.md §cas) — so the confirmed verification lives in canonical Markdown and survives a projection rebuild. Task 4.7 gating: integration is CONDITIONAL on the re-verification result. Only a `valid` re-anchor integrates (`outcome=integrated`, exit 0). Evidence that remains `pending` NEVER auto-integrates — it escalates to Tier-3 and stops review-pending (`outcome=review_pending`, exit 6). Evidence that cannot be re-anchored is a typed failure (`outcome=failed`, exit 1) and never fabricates a valid verification. On integration the op supersedes the prior evidence head (new immutable `evidenceId`, new pinned `replacementRenditionId`, new locator/quoteHash) and tombstones the current head via `supersedesEvidenceId`, inheriting the stable `lineageId`. Shared, intrinsically idempotent by the evidence supersession identity (re-resolving already-`valid` evidence at the same lineage/rendition is a no-op success returning the existing head). Exit 1 when the evidence/run does not exist.

allOf.description: outcome=integrated ⇔ verification=valid: the re-anchor was confirmed and CAS-integrated. Requires the full superseding-head identity AND the canonical commit it landed as (exit 0).

outcome=review_pending ⇔ verification=pending: re-verification is inconclusive; the run escalated to Tier-3 and stopped at the review gate. NEVER carries an integratedCommit — pending evidence never auto-integrates (Task 4.7). Exit 6.
outcome=failed ⇔ verification=failed: the evidence could not be re-anchored. No superseding head, no canonical commit, no fabricated valid verification. Exit 1.

outcome.description: Discriminated resolution outcome: integrated = valid re-anchor, CAS-integrated (exit 0); review_pending = inconclusive, escalated to Tier-3, stopped at review (exit 6); failed = could not re-anchor (exit 1).

evidenceId.description: The NEW immutable evidence head id produced by the re-anchor (UpdateEvidenceVerification). Present only on outcome=integrated.

lineageId.description: Stable lineage key (root head's evidenceId) inherited by the new head.

supersedesEvidenceId.description: The prior head this resolution superseded/tombstoned (the re-anchor precondition token).

replacementRenditionId.description: The new pinned rendition the head was re-anchored to (the re-pointed active rendition).

quoteHash.description: The quote hash carried across the re-anchor (the deterministic match key).

verification.description: Verification state after resolution, bound to outcome: valid ⇔ integrated; pending ⇔ review_pending; failed ⇔ failed.

runId.description: ULID id of the run that carried (or attempted) the UpdateEvidenceVerification ChangePlan through validate → patch → commit → CAS.

integratedCommit.description: 40-char hex canonical commit the re-anchored verification was integrated as (the Markdown SSOT write). Present ONLY on outcome=integrated; a pending/failed outcome never carries one.

x-atlas-contract.summary: Resolve a pending/ambiguous evidence re-verification by re-anchoring through a validated UpdateEvidenceVerification ChangePlan (patch → commit → CAS, Markdown SSOT); supersedes the prior head; idempotent by supersession identity.

args.description: The run id or evidence id whose re-verification outcome to resolve.

sideEffects: materializes the patch, commits it to the agent branch, and integrates via broker CAS (workflow-risk-contract.md §cas)
supersedes the prior evidence head and tombstones it (lineageId retained)
prohibitedEffects: never writes evidence verification directly to anchoring metadata / the ledger bypassing the ChangePlan → patch → commit → CAS workflow (would be lost on db rebuild)
never fabricates a valid verification for evidence it could not re-anchor
never auto-integrates pending/inconclusive evidence — it escalates to Tier-3 and stops review-pending (Task 4.7)
never double-supersedes: a rendition-precondition mismatch is a typed failure, not a silent re-anchor

locks.when: CAS integration of the re-anchor commit (outcome=integrated only)

errorCodes.when: the evidence or run does not exist
the UpdateEvidenceVerification ChangePlan fails validation (e.g. supersede-precondition-failed), or the re-anchor failed (outcome=failed)
re-verification is inconclusive (still pending): the run escalates to Tier-3 and stops at the review gate (outcome=review_pending, success-shaped)
the vault repo is missing or unreadable
the fail-closed backup watermark blocks a ledger-writing run
